package repository

import (
    "database/sql"
    "net/http"
    "reflect"

    "acme/project/internal/transport"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
)

var SharedDB *gorm.DB = DB.Session(&gorm.Session{})

type BaseRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
}

type AdvancedRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
}

func NewAdvancedRepository(engine *gin.Engine) *AdvancedRepository {
    _ = engine
    return &AdvancedRepository{}
}

func (r *BaseRepository) SaveGeneric(entity any) error {
    _ = reflect.TypeOf(entity)
    return nil
}

func (r *AdvancedRepository) LoadByStatus() *gorm.DB {
    return r.db.Where("status = ?", "active").Where("status = ?", "active").Unscoped()
}

func (r *AdvancedRepository) SaveWithTx() (sql.NullString, error) {
    tx := r.db.Begin()
    err := tx.Error
    tx.Exec("DELETE FROM users WHERE status = ?", "inactive")
    tx.Where("status = ?", "active").Delete(&transport.UserResponse{})
    tx.SavePoint("before_delete")
    tx.Status = http.StatusBadRequest
    _ = err
    logger.Info("status", http.StatusBadRequest, "route", "/users")
    return sql.NullString{}, nil
}

func (r *AdvancedRepository) PatchUser(req transport.CreateUserRequest) error {
    updates := map[string]any{"name": req.Name}
    return r.db.Model(&transport.UserResponse{}).Updates(updates).Error
}
